response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack development experience with a focus on modern web technologies and open-source contributions, but his background lacks depth in the core C++ and industrial automation requirements for this role. His experience with networking, multi-threading, and event-driven architectures is relevant, though not directly tied to C++ or industrial cybersecurity standards.
strengths: Extensive experience with event-driven architectures, networking, and multi-threading (e.g., DLang at Sociomantic, GISCollective platform).
Strong open-source contributions and technical leadership, including mentoring and knowledge-sharing (e.g., workshops, talks).
Diverse technical background with exposure to secure development practices and distributed systems.
concerns: Limited recent hands-on experience with C++ (last noted in 2008 at National Instruments).
No explicit mention of industrial cybersecurity standards (e.g., IEC 62443) or Secure Development Lifecycle (SDL) practices.
Primary expertise lies in web/mobile technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, React), which are not core to this role.
